data.title: Amid Fear Of China's Access To Nvidia, AMD Chips Through Middle East, This CEO Assures UAE Reliable Partner For US: 'We Can Guarantee The Safety And Security Of This Technology'
data.description: His comments follow the Biden administration's contemplation of restricting chip sales to the Middle East.

data.title: Coin That Underpins Dogecoin Becomes Market's Biggest Gainer— Litecoin Pops 7% After Filing Of Spot ETF Application
data.description: Litecoin (CRYPTO: LTC) topped the biggest gainers list Tuesday after digital asset trading and management firm Canary Capital filed for an exchange-traded fund (ETF) tracking the proof-of-work (PoW) cryptocurrency's price.

data.title: Apple Mini Gets An AI Upgrade 3 Years After Last Facelift — Price Starts At $499
data.description: Apple has unveiled an upgraded iPad Mini, featuring the new A17 Pro chip, faster CPU and GPU, increased storage, and compatibility with the Apple Pencil Pro, marking the first significant update to the device since 2021.

data.title: Trump Faces Backlash After Suggesting Car Assembly In America Is So Simple A 'Child Could Do' — Former Obama Adviser Challenges Ex-President To Put Together A Car At Next Rally
data.description: Former President Donald Trump drew sharp criticism from labor advocates and Democratic officials after suggesting automotive assembly work is so simple that "we could have our child doing it," prompting a former President Barack Obama's economic adviser to challenge him to demonstrate car assembly at his next rally.

data.title: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest Director Says ChatGPT-Parent Is  'Uniquely Positioned' To Lead AI Revolution But Has Advice For The AI Giant: 'Demonstrate Operational Excellence That Continues To Shine'
data.description: Frank Downing of Ark Investment Management highlighted OpenAI as the leader in the AI revolution, praising its innovation, rapid adoption, and cost efficiency, positioning it ahead of competitors in the rapidly evolving AI landscape.
